user_system_path: Repo hardening Batch 2 (#427): add a typecheck npm script, stop excluding tests/+scripts/ in tsconfig, and drive the 120 surfaced tsc errors (stale test fixtures vs evolved production types) to zero. Type-only changes; no runtime behavior change. NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Batch 2 adds a typecheck script (package.json), un-excludes tests/scripts (tsconfig.json), and fixes type errors in lib/** + scripts/** + tests/** test fixtures (plus one export in lib/briefing/generator.ts). Control plane + docs as usual.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema, API route, or lockfile changes in this batch.
required_local_proof: npm run typecheck && npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: N/A — type-safety + test-fixture changes, no user-facing path change.
acceptance_condition: npm run typecheck clean (tests/+scripts/ included); gate:continuity + build + lint green; vitest unchanged except the two pre-existing reds (pricing button + homepage copy) untouched by this batch.
anti_regression_checks: npm run typecheck exits 0 with tests/ and scripts/ type-checked
no new vitest failures vs main
stop_condition: Stop when Batch 2 is merged and the control plane is ready for Batch 3 (or rolled to between-rungs at session end).
next_command: Proceed to Batch 3 — privacy/logging hygiene (gate auth PII tracing behind FOLDERA_DEBUG_AUTH).
